comments.text: With all due respect, Lamine yamal is by far the most overrated footballer itw and its not even his fault 😅 Dont get me wrong i dont hate the guy, he has carried both my fantasy team and my Stake parlays at times and for that i thank him. And it is true that hes a very talented player. But whats with all the overglazing? I mean i just saw a 26 year old claim that yamal is one of the best footballers hes ever watched in history 😂 I mean if i heard that statement from a 13 year old kid i would understand it because he probably hasnt seen much yet, but mate you're 26...what are you waffling about?
